name: Zenterest
report: The ZenterestPriceFeed price oracle had not been updated for 570 days, resulting in expired prices. The attacker exploited the distorted oracle prices—MPH reported as 944,836,858,607,953 (vs actual $0.4677) and WHITE as 66,570,137,662,599,764 (vs actual $4200)—to borrow 89.91 WHITE with only 23,200 MPH. After repaying the 85.0085 WHITE flash loan, the attacker profited 4.9 WHITE, worth approximately $21,000.
